::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Averages and Range from a List
:::
::: lt-desc
Calculate mean, median, mode and range from a list. Find missing values given the mean, interpret stem-and-leaf diagrams, and work with unknown values given their ratio and overall mean.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Mean, median, mode]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Missing value]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Stem & leaf]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Ratio problems]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Frequency Tables — Ungrouped
:::
::: lt-desc
Calculate mean using $\bar{x} = \dfrac{\sum fx}{\sum f}$, find the median using cumulative frequencies, identify the mode, and determine the range of an unknown frequency $x$ that produces a target median.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Mean from table]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Cumulative frequency]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Mode]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Unknown frequency]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Grouped Frequency Tables
:::
::: lt-desc
Identify modal and median class, estimate the mean using midpoints $\bar{x} \approx \dfrac{\sum fx}{\sum f}$, calculate combined means, and find missing frequencies $a$ and $b$ given total frequency and estimated mean.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Modal class]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Midpoint estimate]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Combined mean]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Missing frequencies]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Cumulative Frequency
:::
::: lt-desc
Build cumulative frequency tables, read values above or below a threshold, use cumulative frequency graphs to estimate $Q_1$, $Q_2$, $Q_3$ and IQR, and find missing values in a cumulative frequency table.
:::
::: lt-skills
[CF table]{.lt-skill .c4}
[CF graph]{.lt-skill .c4}
[$Q_1$, $Q_2$, $Q_3$]{.lt-skill .c4}
[IQR]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Box Plots and IQR
:::
::: lt-desc
Calculate IQR from raw data, draw box-and-whisker plots from a five-number summary, identify outliers using $Q_3 + 1.5 \times \text{IQR}$ and $Q_1 - 1.5 \times \text{IQR}$, and find unknowns in ordered lists given conditions on median, mode and range.
:::
::: lt-skills
[IQR]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Box plot]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Outliers]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Five-number summary]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

:::
